entities.name: Vrijen
entities.context: Owner of the knowledge system (referred to as V)

entities.name: sqlite3
entities.context: Database CLI tool used for querying conversations.db

entities.name: conversations.db
entities.context: SQLite database storing conversation metadata at /home/workspace/N5/data/

entities.name: conversations
entities.context: Core entity/table tracking conversation records with title, focus, parent_id, starred fields

entities.name: artifacts
entities.context: Output items linked to conversations via conversation_id

entities.name: Weekly Cleanup
entities.context: Scheduled maintenance workflow for system diagnostics

entities.name: Maintenance Workflows
entities.context: Category of recurring upkeep tasks for the knowledge system

relationships.context: V owns and operates the conversation database
Database accessed and queried via sqlite3 CLI
Conversations linked to artifacts via conversation_id foreign key
Worker threads are conversations with non-null parent_id (child conversations)
Weekly Cleanup is a type of Maintenance Workflow
